result.stderr:
EagleRepair.Cli 0.0.34
Copyright (c) 2022 Martin Odermatt

  -r, --rules      Specify the set of rules to apply, e.g., R1 R2 R3. If no
                   argument is passed, all rules are applied.

  -p, --path       (Default: .) Specify the full path to the solution (.sln)
                   file.

  -v, --verbose    Set output to verbose messages.

  -o, --output     Specify an output path for statistics.

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.
